name: Kuliouou Ridge Trail
tagline: The best beginner-friendly ridge hike on the island — panoramic Ko'olau views without the death-grip scrambles.
parking: Free street parking on Kalaau Place in the Kuliouou residential area — arrive early on weekends or you'll be circling
bestTime: Early morning for cool temps and clear summit views before clouds roll in
talkStory: About 5 miles round trip with 1,800 ft of elevation gain — it's a steady climb but nothing technical. The switchbacks through the pine forest keep it shaded until you hit the exposed ridge at the top. On a clear day you can see from Koko Head to Kaneohe Bay. Bring plenty of water — there's zero shade for the last quarter mile. The Norfolk pine grove halfway up is a perfect rest spot.
